posts.title: Getting Started with Blockchain Development
posts.author: Md Sifat Bin Jibon
posts.authorRole: Blockchain Developer at R3 & CTO at DataSynthis
posts.description: Complete beginner's guide to blockchain development. Learn blockchain fundamentals, smart contracts, dApps, and build your first blockchain project.
posts.excerpt: Explore the fundamentals of blockchain technology and learn how to build your first decentralized application using modern tools and frameworks.

posts.title: Hackathon Preparation Guide
posts.author: Md Sifat Bin Jibon
posts.authorRole: Blockchain Developer at R3 & CTO at DataSynthis
posts.description: Complete hackathon preparation guide from a seasoned participant with 11 national wins, 1 international victory, and 3 back-to-back championships. Learn preparation strategies, team building, execution tips, pitching mastery, and post-hackathon follow-up.
posts.excerpt: Complete guide to hackathon success from a seasoned participant with 11 national wins, 1 international victory, and 3 back-to-back championships. Learn preparation strategies, team building, execution tips, and presentation mastery.
